final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the output is determined by the XOR of m and n, but in reality, it depends on the AND of all inputs.
module functionality_module (
    input m, 
    input n, 
    input o, 
    input p,
    output reg out);assign out = (~m & ~n & o & p) | (m & n & o & ~p) | (m & n & o & p) | (~m & n & o & p);

endmodule
